dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Hey Ben, did you see the news about Vite 8.1? I just read it online.
dialogue.chinese: 嘿 Ben，你看到关于 Vite 8.1 的新闻了吗？我刚才在网上看到的。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Yeah, I read that it came out on June 23rd, 2026. It sounds really exciting for developers.
dialogue.chinese: 是的，我看到它是在2026年6月23日发布的。对开发者来说真的很令人兴奋。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: They added an experimental bundled mode for really big apps, like a super fast assembly line.
dialogue.chinese: 他们为非常大的应用添加了一个实验性的打包模式，就像一条超快的装配线。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: That sounds like a super fast building tool for huge projects, kind of like a turbo crane.
dialogue.chinese: 这听起来像是一个用于大型项目的超快构建工具，有点像 turbo 起重机。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: I heard it was tested with ten thousand React components, which is a massive amount.
dialogue.chinese: 我听说它用一万个 React 组件进行了测试，这是一个巨大的数量。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Wow, ten thousand components, that is a huge number, like a whole city of tiny pieces!
dialogue.chinese: 哇，一万个组件，这是一个巨大的数字，就像一座由微小部件组成的城市！

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: The test showed startup became about fifteen times faster, almost like a rocket launch!
dialogue.chinese: 测试显示启动速度快了大约十五倍，几乎像火箭发射一样！

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Fifteen times faster? That is like going from a slow bike to a super fast car!
dialogue.chinese: 快十五倍？那就像从慢自行车变成超级快的汽车！

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Also, full page reload was about ten times faster, saving lots of waiting time.
dialogue.chinese: 另外，整个页面重新加载快了大致十倍，节省了很多等待时间。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Ten times faster means less waiting for big apps, so developers stay in the flow.
dialogue.chinese: 快十倍意味着大应用等待时间更少，开发者可以保持流畅。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: Another cool thing is direct WebAssembly ESM imports, like adding fast code blocks.
dialogue.chinese: 另一个酷的功能是直接导入 WebAssembly ESM，就像添加快速的代码块。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: You can now bring in fast WebAssembly code like normal modules, no extra steps.
dialogue.chinese: 现在你可以像普通模块一样引入快速的 WebAssembly 代码，无需额外步骤。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: There are also experimental chunk import maps for better loading, like a map for a treasure hunt.
dialogue.chinese: 还有实验性的分块导入映射，用于更好的加载，像寻宝地图一样。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: Chunk import maps act like a map that tells the browser where each part lives, so it finds things quickly.
dialogue.chinese: 分块导入映射就像一张告诉浏览器每个部分所在位置的地图，这样它可以快速找到内容。

dialogue.speaker: Mia
dialogue.english: All these changes should help developers build huge apps more smoothly, like a well‑oiled machine.
dialogue.chinese: 所有这些更改应该帮助开发者更顺畅地构建大型应用，像一台润滑良好的机器。

dialogue.speaker: Ben
dialogue.english: I am excited to try Vite 8.1 and see the speed boost for myself!
dialogue.chinese: 我很期待尝试 Vite 8.1，亲眼看看速度提升！
